positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a whimsical forest creature, perhaps a bioluminescent fox or a glowing deer, nestled within a detailed, circular mandala structure. The creature should be the primary subject, rendered in clean silhouette style with glowing highlights (cyan, emerald green, deep indigo) defining its outline and key features. The background elements include stylized flora, geometric patterns, and subtle cosmic or celestial elements, suggesting magic and wonder. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by Art Deco meets mystical stained glass, suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. Use a deep, nocturnal color palette with vibrant glowing accents. Vector illustration quality, clean lines, perfect symmetry, central focus, high detail, print ready.
negative: blur, bokeh, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, dirty, grainy, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, abstract, photorealistic, grayscale, sepia, poorly drawn, cropped, unsettling, messy
